title: Stallions top of George basketball
bodyText:
BASKETBALL NEWS - Stallions Basketball Club has been crowned the champion of the 2024 George Basketball League after defeating Garden Route Old Boys in an intense final.


> In the third-place playoff, George Hustlers secured its spot on the podium by overcoming Psychedelic Crow.


The 2024 season was a resounding success, with six teams battling it out for the inaugural title. Despite facing challenges such as a lack of local facilities, the Pacaltsdorp-based Stallions showcased determination and skill to emerge victorious.

The league's success highlights the growing passion for basketball in the region and sets a high standard for future competitions.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
